hero.tagline: Design Creates Value, Quality Defines Life
hero.description: New Home Design & Management is a professional firm specializing in high-end architectural and interior space design. We create residential and commercial spaces that blend aesthetics with functionality. Our team integrates international trends with local cultural elements to deliver tailored solutions for homes, villas, offices, and commercial properties.
hero.awardDescription: Recognized for excellence in landscape architecture

services.title: What We Offer
services.subtitle: From concept to completion, we provide comprehensive landscape design services that transform your outdoor spaces into stunning environments.

residential.title: Residential Construction
residential.description: ADU, full home remodeling, custom high-end cabinetry, and smart home system integration.

commercial.title: Commercial Construction
commercial.description: Restaurant facilities including kitchen equipment and front hall setup for commercial properties.

design.title: Space Design
design.description: Interior design, landscape design, and architectural blueprints for comprehensive space solutions.

consultation.title: Consultation
consultation.description: Initial meeting to understand your vision, needs, and budget requirements.

design.title: Design
design.description: Creating detailed plans and 3D visualizations of your future landscape.

planning.title: Planning
planning.description: Coordinating materials, permits, and timeline for seamless execution.

execution.title: Execution
execution.description: Professional installation with attention to detail and quality craftsmanship.

services.readyTransformDesc: Contact us today for a free consultation and let's bring your vision to life.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Space?
cta.description: Let's work together to create the outdoor space of your dreams. Contact us today for a free consultation.

about.title: ABOUT US
